name: Ranch Style Dressing Mix W/Variations
recipeInstructions:
MIX-Combine the ingredients together well, using a fork to blend. Store in covered container at room temperature up to 1 year. Makes 1 cup mix.
TO USE-Blend the mayo and powder mix well. Combine milk and lemon juice. Let stand 2 to 3 minutes to thoroughly sour. Stir it into dressing mixture. Makes 1 cup of prepared dressing.
Variations:
THOUSAND ISLAND RANCH-Into 1 cup prepared dressing, blend 1/4 cup bottled chili sauce, 2 tablespoons relish. Makes 1-1/3 cups.
CUCUMBER RANCH-Peel and grate or put through blender 1 medium cucumber to a pulp. Combine with 1 teaspoon celery seed and blend into 1 cup prepared dressing. Makes 1-3/4 cups.
ITALIAN CREAMY RANCH-Into 1 cup prepared dressing, blend with fork 1 tablespoon dry minced oregano leaves, 1/2 teaspoon basil leaves, 2 tablespoons chopped dill pickle, 3 tablespoons dill pickle juice and 4 tablespoons oil. Makes 1-3/4 cups.
CATALINA RANCH-Into 1 cup prepared dressing, blend with fork, 1 tablespoon chili powder, 1/2 teaspoon paprika, 2 tablespoons ketchup, 1/4 teaspoon cumin powder, 2 tablespoons sugar and 1 tablespoon vinegar. Makes 1-3/4 cups.
